name: Calendar Integration
script:
import frappe

# Validation
if not doc.surveyor:
    frappe.throw("Please select a Surveyor")

if not doc.survey_start_date or not doc.survey_end_date:
    frappe.throw("Survey start and end date are required")

# Create Event
event = frappe.new_doc("Event")
event.subject = f"Survey Assigned: {doc.name}"
event.event_type = "Private"

event.starts_on = doc.survey_start_date
event.ends_on = doc.survey_end_date

event.description = f"""
Survey ID: {doc.name}
Lead: {doc.lead or ''}
Opportunity: {doc.opportunity or ''}
Notes: {doc.notes or ''}
"""

# Assign event to surveyor
event.append("event_participants", {
    "reference_doctype": "User",
    "reference_docname": doc.surveyor
})

# Enable Google Calendar sync
event.sync_with_google_calendar = 1

# Link Event back to Survey
event.append("links", {
    "link_doctype": "Survey",
    "link_name": doc.name
})

# Save Event
event.insert(ignore_permissions=True)

# Assign Event to Surveyor (shows in ERPNext ToDo / notifications)
frappe.assign("Event", event.name, doc.surveyor)
